창세기 46:1.content: Israel traveled with all that he had, and came to Beersheba, and offered sacrifices to the God of his father, Isaac.

창세기 46:2.content: God spoke to Israel in the visions of the night, and said, “Jacob, Jacob!” He said, “Here I am.”

창세기 46:3.content: He said, “I am God, the God of your father. Don’t be afraid to go down into Egypt, for there I will make of you a great nation.

창세기 46:4.content: I will go down with you into Egypt. I will also surely bring you up again. Joseph’s hand will close your eyes.”

창세기 46:5.content: Jacob rose up from Beersheba, and the sons of Israel carried Jacob, their father, their little ones, and their wives, in the wagons which Pharaoh had sent to carry him.

창세기 46:6.content: They took their livestock, and their goods, which they had gotten in the land of Canaan, and came into Egypt—Jacob, and all his offspring with him,

창세기 46:7.content: his sons, and his sons’ sons with him, his daughters, and his sons’ daughters, and he brought all his offspring with him into Egypt.

창세기 46:8.content: These are the names of the children of Israel, who came into Egypt, Jacob and his sons: Reuben, Jacob’s firstborn.

창세기 46:9.content: The sons of Reuben: Hanoch, Pallu, Hezron, and Carmi.

창세기 46:10.content: The sons of Simeon: Jemuel, Jamin, Ohad, Jachin, Zohar, and Shaul the son of a Canaanite woman.

창세기 46:11.content: The sons of Levi: Gershon, Kohath, and Merari.

창세기 46:12.content: The sons of Judah: Er, Onan, Shelah, Perez, and Zerah; but Er and Onan died in the land of Canaan. The sons of Perez were Hezron and Hamul.

창세기 46:13.content: The sons of Issachar: Tola, Puvah, Iob, and Shimron.

창세기 46:14.content: The sons of Zebulun: Sered, Elon, and Jahleel.

창세기 46:15.content: These are the sons of Leah, whom she bore to Jacob in Paddan Aram, with his daughter Dinah. All the souls of his sons and his daughters were thirty-three.

창세기 46:16.content: The sons of Gad: Ziphion, Haggi, Shuni, Ezbon, Eri, Arodi, and Areli.

창세기 46:17.content: The sons of Asher: Imnah, Ishvah, Ishvi, Beriah, and Serah their sister. The sons of Beriah: Heber and Malchiel.

창세기 46:18.content: These are the sons of Zilpah, whom Laban gave to Leah, his daughter, and these she bore to Jacob, even sixteen souls.

창세기 46:19.content: The sons of Rachel, Jacob’s wife: Joseph and Benjamin.

창세기 46:20.content: To Joseph in the land of Egypt were born Manasseh and Ephraim, whom Asenath, the daughter of Potiphera, priest of On, bore to him.

창세기 46:21.content: The sons of Benjamin: Bela, Becher, Ashbel, Gera, Naaman, Ehi, Rosh, Muppim, Huppim, and Ard.

창세기 46:22.content: These are the sons of Rachel, who were born to Jacob: all the souls were fourteen.

창세기 46:24.content: The sons of Naphtali: Jahzeel, Guni, Jezer, and Shillem.

창세기 46:25.content: These are the sons of Bilhah, whom Laban gave to Rachel, his daughter, and these she bore to Jacob: all the souls were seven.

창세기 46:26.content: All the souls who came with Jacob into Egypt, who were his direct offspring, in addition to Jacob’s sons’ wives, all the souls were sixty-six.

창세기 46:27.content: The sons of Joseph, who were born to him in Egypt, were two souls. All the souls of the house of Jacob, who came into Egypt, were seventy.

창세기 46:28.content: Jacob sent Judah before him to Joseph, to show the way before him to Goshen, and they came into the land of Goshen.

창세기 46:29.content: Joseph prepared his chariot, and went up to meet Israel, his father, in Goshen. He presented himself to him, and fell on his neck, and wept on his neck a good while.

창세기 46:30.content: Israel said to Joseph, “Now let me die, since I have seen your face, that you are still alive.”

창세기 46:31.content: Joseph said to his brothers, and to his father’s house, “I will go up, and speak with Pharaoh, and will tell him, ‘My brothers, and my father’s house, who were in the land of Canaan, have come to me.

창세기 46:32.content: These men are shepherds, for they have been keepers of livestock, and they have brought their flocks, and their herds, and all that they have.’

창세기 46:33.content: It will happen, when Pharaoh summons you, and will say, ‘What is your occupation?’

창세기 46:34.content: that you shall say, ‘Your servants have been keepers of livestock from our youth even until now, both we, and our fathers:’ that you may dwell in the land of Goshen; for every shepherd is an abomination to the Egyptians.”
